title: Ubiquiti AM-V2G-Ti, 2.4GHz, sector antenna Titanium, changeable angle 60°-120°, 15-17dBi
description: AM-V2G-Ti airMAX Titanuim Sector Antenna is a 15 - 17dBi Carrier Class 2x2 MIMO (Dual Polarity) Sector Antenna with 60° - 120° beam angle that was designed for 2.4GHz band and for integrate with Rocket M radios (RocketM sold separately). Adjustable Beamwidth Configuration - Having adjustable beamwidth options enhances scalability and streamlines inventory. The airMAX Titanium Sector may be custom configured for any deployment requiring a 60° , 90° , or 120° sector. Antenna gain changes… 20% increase in performance with PtMP networks Up to 90% performance improvement in a co-location environment Increased durability in harsh weather Antenna Rocket protector (2) RSMA male - RSMA male pigtail Holder + screws
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 2 x 2 Polarization VH VSWR < 1,5 F/B ratio [dB] 30 Cross-Pol Isolation [dB] 20 Variability of beam angle Yes Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 60, 90, 120 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 60, 90, 120 Antenna type Sector Antenna gain [dBi] 15, 16, 17 Connectors and Interfaces Rocket kit Yes RF connectors (2) RSMA female
